workspace.name: Just Cause Canada
workspace.story: Just Cause Canada equips youth in East Africa with technology, mentorship, and entrepreneurship skills so they can create solutions for their communities.

projects.title: High Tech Program
projects.description: Immersive coding, robotics, and design training for secondary students.

projects.title: Community Innovation Labs
projects.description: Pop-up labs bringing hands-on technology workshops to rural schools.

projects.title: Entrepreneurship Bootcamp
projects.description: Mentorship and seed funding for youth-led ventures tackling local issues.

recipients_category.name: Program Participants
recipients_category.description: Students enrolled in coding and technology intensives.

recipients.story: Brenda built an award-winning health app during the High Tech Program and now trains younger students.

news.title: Robotics Showcase Celebrates Young Innovators
news.excerpt: Students presented prototypes tackling community challenges.
news.body: Graduates from the High Tech Program unveiled robotics projects ranging from clean water sensors to crop monitoring devices.

pdfs.description: Program overview for the High Tech initiative.
